markdown:
#  What do we need to consider before allowing downstream collaborators to submit invoices in Procore? 
##  Background 
Before granting your [downstream collaborators](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-a-downstream-collaborator) permission to submit [subcontractor invoices](https://v2.support.procore.com/glossary-of-terms) for their [commitments](https://v2.support.procore.com/glossary-of-terms) on a Procore project, your company's [Procore Administrator](https://support.procore.com/procore-learning-paths/general-contractor/procore-administrator) and project teams should decide if it is the best choice for your company. Questions to ask include:
  * Do you want to save time and effort by allowing downstream collaborators to submit their own invoices to your Procore project?
  * Does the downstream collaborator have an employee or representative to be an [invoice contact](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-an-invoice-contact)?


#####  Tip
**Don't want your downstream collaborators submitting invoices in Procore?** If your team prefers to collect paper or digital invoices from downstream collaborators outside of Procore, simply provide one or more project team member(s) with the required user permissions so they can [Create a Subcontractor Invoice on Behalf of an Invoice Contact](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/invoicing-project/tutorials/create-an-invoice-on-behalf-of-an-invoice-contact).
##  Answer 
To help your team decide who can submit invoices in your Procore projects, review the information in this table.  
| An employee or representative for a downstream collaborator  | [Invoice Contact](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-an-invoice-contact)  | No. An invoice contact only has access to view data and submit invoices for their assigned commitments.  |  Yes. To view a commitment and all of its corresponding invoice data, you must designate an invoice contact for each individual commitment in your project.
  * Your team controls which commitments an invoice contact can interact with.
  * Your team has the option to invite contacts to submit invoices. See [Send an 'Invite to Bill' to an Invoice Contact](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/invoicing-project/tutorials/send-an-invite-to-bill-to-an-invoice-contact).

 | 
  * Provide this link to invited invoice contacts: [Submit a New Subontractor Invoice as an Invoice Contact](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payee-user-guide/submit-an-invoice)
  * If you don't send invites, provide this link: [Create](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/invoicing-project/tutorials/create-a-new-subcontractor-invoice-as-an-invoice-contact)[ a New Subcontractor Invoice as an Invoice Contact](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/invoicing-project/tutorials/create-a-new-subcontractor-invoice-as-an-invoice-contact)

 |  
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |  
| A trusted employee or team member  | [Invoice Administrator](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/add-invoice-administrators)  | Yes. An invoice administrator can create, read, update, and delete all project commitments.  | No. This person can view all of the commitment and invoice data on the project(s) to which they have been granted access permissions.  | 
  * [Create a Subcontractor Invoice on Behalf of an Invoice Contact](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/invoicing-project/tutorials/create-an-invoice-on-behalf-of-an-invoice-contact)

 |  
## See Also
  * [What is an invoice contact?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-an-invoice-contact)
  * [Does an invoice contact need an 'Invite to Bill' to submit an invoice?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-does-an-invoice-contact-need-an-invite-to-bill-to-submit-an-invoice)
  * [What are configurable fieldsets and which Procore tools support them?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-are-configurable-fieldsets-and-which-procore-tools-support-them)
title: What do we need to consider before allowing downstream collaborators to submit invoices in Procore?
description: Considerations for making the decision to allow external collaborators to submit subcontractor invoices in Procore.
